description: Jaco reunites with his team after successfully crossing through a breach, updating Pax and Snowflake on Tinker’s demise and impending plans. They prepare to rendezvous at the museum, foreshadowing an imminent confrontation with S.H.I.E.L.D. This sets up the main antagonists’ coordinated movement toward their mysterious objective.

transcript.line: Didn't know if you'd get through.
You want to drop the blaster?
What do you mean didn't make it? What the hell happened?
You came through something they built here? A native structure?
What about Sarge? He's coming soon.
Okay, a museum. All right, well, let's get there. And blow it straight to hell.
